ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Elettione et obligo dei quattro nodari dell`Accademia
ItacWorkItem.Notes: There is no date or place of publication. The document declares that four notaries were appointed by Giustiniano Badoer. Notaries promise to be at the Academy every week on a shift rotation, and to split the charges according to this order: Nicolo` Cignigni (`nodaro dell`oratorio`), Zuan Figolin (nodaro del consiglio delle scienze`), Carlo Bianco (`nodaro del consiglio economico`), and Marcantonio Figolino (`nodaro del consiglio politico`). The notaries leave to Federico Badoer to decide with regard to their salary.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
